name: LedgerLift Validate
LedgerLift Daily Refresh
script:
# NOT a standalone script — this is the body of a Server Script record
# (Script Type: Scheduler Event, Frequency: Daily).
# Keeps Days Outstanding current on open records without anyone editing them,
# so list view sorting/filtering by age stays truthful. Paid records are left
# untouched. Uses doc.db_set with update_modified=False so the daily refresh
# does not churn the modified timestamp or version log.

today = frappe.utils.nowdate()
rows = frappe.get_all(
    "LedgerLift Tracker",
    filters={
        "recovery_status": ["!=", "Paid"],
        "oldest_invoice_date": ["is", "set"],
    },
    fields=["name", "oldest_invoice_date", "days_outstanding"],
    limit_page_length=0,
)
for row in rows:
    days = frappe.utils.date_diff(today, row.oldest_invoice_date) or 0
    if days != row.days_outstanding:
        record = frappe.get_doc("LedgerLift Tracker", row.name)
        record.db_set("days_outstanding", days, update_modified=False)

name: LedgerLift Fetch Balance
script:
customer = frappe.form_dict.get("customer")
result = {"outstanding_amount": 0, "oldest_invoice_date": None, "invoice_count": 0}
if customer:
    gl = frappe.get_all(
        "GL Entry",
        filters={"party_type": "Customer", "party": customer, "is_cancelled": 0},
        fields=["debit", "credit"],
        limit_page_length=0,
    )
    net = sum(g.debit - g.credit for g in gl)
    result["outstanding_amount"] = net

    invs = frappe.get_all(
        "Sales Invoice",
        filters={"customer": customer, "docstatus": 1, "outstanding_amount": [">", 0]},
        fields=["outstanding_amount", "posting_date"],
        order_by="posting_date asc",
        limit_page_length=0,
    )
    result["invoice_count"] = len(invs)
    if net > 0 and invs:
        si_out = sum(i.outstanding_amount for i in invs)
        running = si_out - net
        for i in invs:
            if running >= i.outstanding_amount:
                running -= i.outstanding_amount
            else:
                result["oldest_invoice_date"] = str(i.posting_date)
                break
frappe.response["message"] = result

name: LedgerLift Avg Days
script:
rows = frappe.get_all("LedgerLift Tracker",
    filters={"recovery_status": ["!=", "Paid"]},
    fields=["days_outstanding"], limit_page_length=0)
vals = [r.days_outstanding or 0 for r in rows]
avg = int(round(sum(vals) / len(vals))) if vals else 0
frappe.response["message"] = avg

name: LedgerLift Due Followups
StockPilot Freeze Classes
script:
res = frappe.get_doc("Report", "StockPilot Categories").execute_script_report({"view": "raw"})
mp = {}
for r in res[1]:
    cc = (r.get("m") or "C") + (r.get("v") or "C")
    mp[r.get("code")] = [cc, frappe.utils.flt(r.get("a12"))]
doc = frappe.get_doc("StockPilot Settings")
doc.frozen_class_map = json.dumps(mp)
doc.frozen_on = frappe.utils.nowdate()
doc.save()
frappe.response["message"] = "%d items frozen on %s" % (len(mp), doc.frozen_on)

name: StockPilot Class Freeze Refresh
Driver Slip Validate
Driver Slip Submit
Driver Slip Bootstrap
Driver Slip Make Invoice
script:
# Driver Slip -> draft PI/SI, THE RULE: one slip = ONE document, KP leg only.
# Multi-item: one invoice line per slip row; per-row rate_inc is filled by the
# office in the grid before converting. Field template = the submitted July
# batch (PI26-00042 / SI26-00667) with the standing stock fix (update_stock=1;
# warehouse from the slip, default 1 MAIN STORE - VAC).
# Office-only; creates a DRAFT — the accountant reviews and submits.

utype = frappe.db.get_value("User", frappe.session.user, "user_type")
if utype != "System User":
    frappe.throw("Office users only")

slip_name = frappe.form_dict.get("slip")
if not slip_name:
    frappe.throw("slip required")
slip = frappe.get_doc("Driver Slip", slip_name)

if slip.status != "Pending Review":
    frappe.throw("Slip is already " + slip.status)
if slip.direction not in ("Purchase", "Sale"):
    frappe.throw("Slip has no direction — set From (कुठून) first")
if not slip.get("items"):
    frappe.throw("Slip has no goods rows")

wh = slip.warehouse or "1 MAIN STORE - VAC"
inv_items = []
for row in slip.items:
    r = frappe.utils.flt(row.rate_inc)
    if r <= 0:
        frappe.throw("Fill Rate ₹/bag on row " + str(row.idx) + " (" + (row.item or "?") + ") in the goods grid, save, then convert")
    inv_items.append({"item_code": row.item, "qty": row.qty, "rate": r, "warehouse": wh})

KP = "Krushiyog Plant, Paraswada"
remarks = "Driver Slip " + slip.name + " · Challan " + (slip.challan_no or "?") + (" · " + slip.destination if slip.destination else "")

if slip.direction == "Purchase":
    # from KP: plain purchase, unregistered supplier -> no tax rows (matches all 200+ KP PIs)
    inv = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Purchase Invoice",
        "naming_series": "PI.YY.-.#####.",
        "company": "Vijay Agro Centre",
        "supplier": KP,
        "posting_date": slip.slip_date,
        "set_posting_time": 1,
        "due_date": slip.slip_date,
        "update_stock": 1,
        "remarks": remarks,
        "items": inv_items,
    })
else:
    # to KP: in-state inclusive GST — naming the template does NOT populate rows
    # on server-side insert (the desk does that client-side), so append the
    # template's rows explicitly; rate 0 lets each item's own tax template set
    # the split, included_in_print_rate=1 back-computes from the inclusive rate.
    inv = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Sales Invoice",
        "naming_series": "SI.YY.-.#####.",
        "company": "Vijay Agro Centre",
        "customer": KP,
        "posting_date": slip.slip_date,
        "set_posting_time": 1,
        "due_date": slip.slip_date,
        "update_stock": 1,
        "taxes_and_charges": "Output GST In-state Inclusive - VAC",
        "remarks": remarks,
        "items": inv_items,
        "taxes": [
            {"charge_type": "On Net Total", "account_head": "Output Tax CGST - VAC", "rate": 0,
             "included_in_print_rate": 1, "description": "Output Tax CGST", "cost_center": "Main - VAC - VACG"},
            {"charge_type": "On Net Total", "account_head": "Output Tax SGST - VAC", "rate": 0,
             "included_in_print_rate": 1, "description": "Output Tax SGST", "cost_center": "Main - VAC - VACG"},
        ],
    })

inv.insert()

slip.status = "Invoiced"
slip.invoice_type = inv.doctype
slip.invoice_ref = inv.name
slip.save()

frappe.response["message"] = {"invoice": inv.name, "doctype": inv.doctype, "grand_total": inv.grand_total}
